---
title: "Project 4 Report"
author: "Joe Nagel"
date: ""
output: 
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 12pt
mainfont: Helvetica
geometry: margin=1in
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \doublespacing
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(list(echo = FALSE, include = FALSE))
```

```{r}
# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(hdrm)
library(tictoc)
library(olsrr)
library(glmnet)
library(broom)
source("backwards_selection.R")
```

```{r}
# define simulation parameters
params = list(
    replications = 10,
    n = c(250, 500),
    p = 20,
    beta = c((1:5)/6, rep(0, 15)),
    rho = c(0, 0.35, 0.7),
    alpha = 0.5,
    p_val = 0.15,
    nvar = length(beta),
    family = "gaussian",
    correlation_structure = "exchangeable",
    seed = 4130
)
params$nvar = length(params$beta)
```

```{r}
set.seed(params$seed)
tic()
simulated_data = (
    expand_grid(
        .vary = "fastest",
        replication = 1:params$replications,
        n = params$n,
        rho = params$rho
    )
    %>% mutate(
        simulated_data = pmap(
            list(n, rho),
            \(n, rho) gen_data(
                n = n,
                p = params$nvar,
                beta = params$beta,
                family = params$family,
                corr = params$correlation_structure,
                rho = rho
            )
        ),
        reduced_models = map(
            simulated_data,
            \(simulated_data) get_reduced_models(
                simulated_data = simulated_data,
                alpha = params$alpha,
                p_val = params$p_val
            )
        )
    )
)
toc()
```

```{r}
simulated_data
```


# Introduction

# Methods

# Results

# Discussion and Conclusion

# Reproducible Research

## GitHub Link

`https://github.com/nageljo/BIOS6624`
